creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
I tried it out today and I afraid I am also encountering problems when I try and autocomplete (in a java method try and autocomplete "String" by typing "Stri" followed by CTRL+SPACE) it core dumps. The stack trace is in a callback from webkit.

I tried both webkit2-gtk3-2.34.6_3 and webkit2-gtk3-2.22.6 (which used to work), both cause the application to core dump.

I can upload the full stack trace is that is useful.
